title: Ikingok ke Ammu
description: Ememei Ammu ikingok. Konye elimonikini ikepapero ebe ejataar!Ekiror ike ikingok erai Shankar,ebala kwangin. Emina Shankar ainyam etaget, ebala akes ya nen. Elimonikin ikepapero nu ipu nu ikamunitos Shankar. Ido ekotosi ikepapero abunere ore kes awanyun Shankar. Inyobo do ebeit Ammu aswam kwana?

pages.text:
Emamei Ammu ikingok.
Konye obu olimoki ngin tunganan osomero ebe ejaatar.

"Ekiror ika ikingok erai Shankar", ebala elimokini Venu.
"Enyami Shankar etaget", olimokin Abdul.
"Iriono Skankar", olimokin Kumari.
"Ebolianenei Shankar emopira keda eong", ebala nene elomikini Unni.

Aso apotu Venu, Abdul, Kumari, keda Unni Olimokisi Ammu ebe ekotosi alosit ore kes.
Awanyu Shankar. Ijangak Ammu akouke.

Inyobo? Ebakasi.
"Narai ekurian Shankar itunga," ebela Ammu.
"iboliabodosio keda nges idope idope," ebala kumari.

"Mam yes ipedorete," ebala Ammu.
"Anuboinyo?" ingisi Unni.
"Narai ilosi sio kinga  lolo," ebala Ammu.

"Ibuni bodo sio moi," ebala Abdul.
"Iyaunisio nges etaget,"ebala Venu.
"Iboliasio keda nges idope idope,"ebala Kumari.
"Aya," ebala Ammu.
Mam ajeni ace nu limuna.

Abong ngin, abu Ammu ingit Achan arai epatan agwelakin nges ikingok.
"Iwanyuni ber oni," ebala Achan.
"konye erai na atipet," said Ammu.
Okweniari do Achan.

Tipurucu ke,ebala Amma, "isubit jo bala ideka".
Otirori do ereete ke Ammu. Emwana!

"Osalak lolo ore," ebala Amma.
Aso mam Ammu abu oloto osemero.
Obu Ammu opere aparan kere. Ido mam emuremuria nepe chep.
Obu onyam acilet na emugati bon oboro kere.
"Anu inyo mam jo ibunitor osemero lolo," ingisi Unni.

"Iwanyunit sio Shankar," ebala Abdul.
"Ayibo?" Ingisi Ammu.
"Omisiri," ebala Kumari.

Katipet, abu Ammu onyou ojamu.
Okeri do kinya.

Erai abeit. Ejai ikingok amisiri ke. Shankar!
"Konye mam iriono,"ebala Venu.
"Erenge!"
"Ooo," ebala Ammu. " abu eong etemoki ngun!"

"Mam ekuriana itunga ," ebala Abdul.
"Ooo," ebala Ammu,"Abu eong etemoki nu da!"

"Mam emina abolia emopira," ebala Unni.
"Ooo," ebala Ammu. "Abu eong etemoki nen da!"

"Konye emina etaget," ebala Kumari.
"Alimokit eong yes, imam?" imuriemuria Ammu keda ayalam.

"Konye emina etaget," ebala Kumari.
"Alimokit eong yes, imam?" imuriemuria Ammu keda ayalam.

"Konye emina etaget," ebala Kumari.
"Alimokit eong yes, imam?" imuriemuria Ammu keda ayalam.
